title: Towson University students tackle real-world problems in AI for Humanity challenge with Mind Over Machines
description: Towson University partnered with Mind Over Machines to host an AI for Humanity challenge where students tackled real-world problems using artificial intelligence.

title: Advanced Micro (AMD) Soars to All-Time High as AI Bolsters Profits by Nearly Double
description: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) is one of the 10 Stocks Outperforming Wall Street With Monster Returns. Advanced Micro Devices soared to a new all-time high on Wednesday, following the strong results of its earnings performance in the first quarter of the year, with profits nearly doubling, thanks to the rapidly growing artificial intelligence sector. [...]

title: Most contact centers expand agent roles rather than cut jobs as AI spreads, Gartner finds
description: Most contact centers are expanding agent roles as AI spreads, not cutting staff. A Gartner survey found 85% of service leaders are broadening what human reps do, while only 31% plan layoffs through early 2027.

title: The chip craze is turning a glass company and a toilet maker into AI stocks
description: Investors are driving big gains in companies making components vital to AI infrastructure.
